current_read.title: Dario Amodei: "Machines of Loving Grace"
current_read.description: Dario Amodei's essay on what a world transformed by powerful AI could look like — exploring the potential for AI to accelerate scientific progress, eliminate disease, and reshape the economy over the next 5-10 years.

current_listen.title: Dwarkesh Podcast: Terence Tao episode
current_listen.description: Terence Tao, one of the world's leading mathematicians, discusses how AI is transforming mathematics, using Kepler's data-driven discovery of planetary motion as an analogy for understanding where AI excels (breadth) versus where humans provide depth in mathematical research.
